/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/LinuxUserspaceEmulator.dir/ELFLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LinuxUserspaceEmulator.dir/Emulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LinuxUserspaceEmulator.dir/ELFSymbols.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LinuxUserspaceEmulator.dir/LinuxSyscalls.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LinuxUserspaceEmulator.dir/SoftCPU64.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LinuxUserspaceEmulator.dir/SoftMMU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LinuxUserspaceEmulator.dir/main.cpp.o -o LinuxUserspaceEmulator
